comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Every check starts at passes=false. A check may be flipped to true only after its verification command ran and the evidence file (log, report, or screenshot path relative to the repository root) was inspected. check-contract.(sh|ps1) refuses Done while any required check fails. Checks with required:false that have passes=false must carry a non-empty waiver_reason explaining why the check does not apply.

checks.waiver_reason: Non-code stack (Markdown SKILL.md + PowerShell Pester test files) per Global Constraints 'Non-code stack' descriptor in specs/sdd-domain/tasks.md; no lint toolchain is configured for this file set. Waived via stack: docs per risk-gate-matrix.md (compile-oriented checks waivable on non-code stacks).

Non-code stack (Markdown + PowerShell Pester scripts); there is no compiled/typed language toolchain applicable to this task's files. Waived via stack: docs per risk-gate-matrix.md (compile-oriented checks waivable on non-code stacks).
No integration-test layer exists for this feature; domain-model's mode routing is validated via the structural/fixture Pester suites covering unit-tests, acceptance-tests, and regression instead.

Non-code stack (Markdown SKILL.md + PowerShell Pester test files) per Global Constraints 'Non-code stack' descriptor; there is no build/compile step for this file set. Waived via stack: docs per risk-gate-matrix.md (compile-oriented checks waivable on non-code stacks).

domain-model is an agent-driven Claude Code skill (mode-routing prose plus a human-in-the-loop update algorithm), not a startable process, dev server, or CLI binary; there is nothing to smoke-run. Behavior is covered by the acceptance-tests and regression checks instead.

T-004 is a net-new skill (domain-model/SKILL.md did not exist before this task) with no baseline-behavior.md; differential-test-policy.md applies only to refactor/bugfix tasks with a documented baseline, which does not apply here.
No browser-renderable UI surface is touched by this task; domain-model is a CLI/skill-invocation entry point (Markdown + frontmatter), not a rendered screen or DOM.

The repository's design-system/ contract governs UI-layer (rendered/visual) files; this task touches only a skill's Markdown documentation and PowerShell test fixtures, not UI-layer files, so design-system conformance does not apply.
